testcase.name: test_get_device_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Could not find staff user assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_anti_theft.py:218: in test_get_device_status assert user_id, "Could not find staff user" E AssertionError: Could not find staff user E assert None

testcase.name: test_photo_cleanup_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_anti_theft.py:293: in test_photo_cleanup_endpoint_exists token = self.get_admin_token() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration48_anti_theft.py:235: in get_admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 10 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_attendance_records_have_id
